arts.ttl: 5 reasons Borussia Dortmund will still finish in the top four
arts.sum: With Niko Kovač's tactical magic, Serhou Guirassy's goals and the weight of history behind them, bundesliga.com makes the case for an end-of-season resurgence from the Black-Yellows... New Dortmund coach Niko Kovač (r.) previously won a Bundesliga and DFB Cup double in charge of Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Kovac issues squad update ahead of Bochum fixture
arts.sum: Niko Kovac sat down in front of the cameras in Dortmund's press conference ahead of the local derby with VfL Bochum.

arts.ttl: Drewes ruled out of Bochum's derby clash with Dortmund
arts.sum: Patrick Drewes will not be able to play when VfL Bochum face local rivals Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: What to expect From Kovac and Dortmund
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund’s decision to appoint Niko Kovac as their new head coach marks a pivotal moment in the 2024/25 season.

arts.ttl: BVB youngsters find careers stalling, RN reports
arts.sum: Teenagers Kjell Watjen, Cole Campbell, Filippo Mane and Almugera Kabar have yet to gain regular minutes on the pitch for the Dortmund senior team.

arts.ttl: Bochum vs. Borussia Dortmund preview: Derby bragging rights at stake
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund will look to get their top-four bid back on track when they travel to the Vonovia Ruhrstadion for Saturday’s ‘little Revierderby’ against Bochum.

arts.ttl: Preview: VfL Bochum vs. Borussia Dortmund - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between VfL Bochum and Borussia Dortmund, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Juventus Sets Sights on Offensive Overhaul: Lookman Emerges as Target Alongside Adeyemi and Osimhen
arts.sum: Juventus are already planning for the future with a clear objective: to redefine and strengthen their attack. While the summer of 2024 saw significant midfield changes and the winter 2025 transfer window prioritized defensive reinforcements due to injuries, the upcoming summer will see Sporting Director Cristiano Giuntoli focusing particularly on bolstering the Bianconeri's offensive lineup. The post Juventus Sets Sights on Offensive Overhaul: Lookman Emerges as Target Alongside Adeyemi and Osimhen appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Adeyemi Switches His Agents Ahead of Likely Summer Move
arts.sum: Karim Adeyemi didn’t head to Serie A in the past two windows even though Juventus and Napoli surely tried to convince him. Borussia Dortmund managed to keep ahold of him, either thanks to their resistance or because of the will of the player. The post Adeyemi Switches His Agents Ahead of Likely Summer Move appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Match Ratings: BVB Leave Lisbon With 3-0 Win in Champions League Playoffs
arts.sum: Second-half goals from Serhou Guirassy, Pascal Groß, and Karim Adeyemi secured Kovač’s first win as BVB manager and gave Dortmund a big advantage heading into the second leg at the Westfalenstadion later in the month. While the first half looked like more of the same issues Dortmund have struggled with this season, they looked much improved after the break, giving BVB fans some hope that the club’s fortunes will start to improve with Kovač at the wheel.
